title: Aggregate with window function in subquery
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.top_2_posts_per_category/0` that returns the top 2 posts per category by `view_count`. Use an inner subquery that selects `row_number() |> over(partition_by: p.category_id, order_by: [desc: p.view_count])` as `rn`, then the outer query filters `rn <= 2`. Use `subquery/1` properly. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Canonical 'top-N per group' pattern: window function inside a subquery, filter on the window result in the outer query. Advanced synthesis.
